scripts.check: node --check vite.config.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/engine.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/resolution.js && node --check scripts/manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/write-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-runtime-assets.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run build
scripts.setup: npm run prepare:assets && npm run build:engine
